mapper.select: SELECT id, site_cd, site_nm, customer_nm, customer_cd, material_cd, material_nm, spec, remark, bid_price, proc_price, processing_cost, argon_cost, insul_cost, struct_cost, edge_cost, etching_cost, step_cost, deform_cost, temper1_cost, temper2_cost, temper3_cost, total_processing_cost FROM site_price WHERE site_cd = #{siteCd} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_price ( site_cd, site_nm, customer_nm, customer_cd, material_cd, material_nm, spec, remark, bid_price, proc_price, processing_cost, argon_cost, insul_cost, struct_cost, edge_cost, etching_cost, step_cost, deform_cost, temper1_cost, temper2_cost, temper3_cost, total_processing_cost ) VALUES ( #{siteCd}, #{siteNm}, #{customerNm}, #{customerCd}, #{materialCd}, #{materialNm}, #{spec}, #{remark}, #{bidPrice}, #{procPrice}, #{processingCost}, #{argonCost}, #{insulCost}, #{structCost}, #{edgeCost}, #{etchingCost}, #{stepCost}, #{deformCost}, #{temper1Cost}, #{temper2Cost}, #{temper3Cost}, #{totalProcessingCost} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_price SET material_cd = #{req.materialCd}, material_nm = #{req.materialNm}, spec = #{req.spec}, remark = #{req.remark}, bid_price = #{req.bidPrice}, proc_price = #{req.procPrice}, processing_cost = #{req.processingCost}, argon_cost = #{req.argonCost}, insul_cost = #{req.insulCost}, struct_cost = #{req.structCost}, edge_cost = #{req.edgeCost}, etching_cost = #{req.etchingCost}, step_cost = #{req.stepCost}, deform_cost = #{req.deformCost}, temper1_cost = #{req.temper1Cost}, temper2_cost = #{req.temper2Cost}, temper3_cost = #{req.temper3Cost}, total_processing_cost = #{req.totalProcessingCost}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE site_price SET customer_cd = #{customerCd}, customer_nm = #{customerNm}, updated_at = now() WHERE site_cd = #{siteCd}
